rules.description: The staged preview profile must be explicitly allowed for the selected interoperability readiness profile.
The staged preview must be derived from the supplied version-pinned dossier.
All required mapped fields must be present in the staged preview.
The staged preview must produce a non-empty target document.
The linked dossier must satisfy the governed dossier-readiness profile for the selected interoperability gate.
Unsupported local-only fields may require review or may block the selected interoperability gate.
Derived or review-required mappings may require review or may block the selected interoperability gate.
